(404/MAS) FROM DEPT. #403. PARTIES IN PRO PER. JENNIFER JACKSON, FORMER COUNSEL TO PET, PRESENT TO ASSIST WITH SETTLEMENT. STIP FOR PRO TEM SIGNED. PARTIES HAD MET IN S
ETTLEMENT CONFERENCE AND REACHED PARTIAL STIPULATION WHICH WAS STATED INTO THE RECORD IN DEPT. #403 BEFORE JUDGE WOOLARD, DURING NOON HOUR. PARTIES
MANAGEMENT CORP. FOR SALE WITH MARIA MELODY, WHICH SHALL REMAIN LISTED UNTIL SOLD. NET PROCEEDS TO BE DIVIDED EQUALLY. RESP SHALL PAY TO PET, OUT OF
LICY AND WILL GIVE TO PET $5K/YR SO THAT SHE MAY MAKE PAYMENTS. RESP SHALL GIVE $75K TO PET FORTHWITH FOR RETROACTIVE PAYMENT OF TEMPORARY SUPPORT
FIABLE. PARTIES AGREE TO SUPPORT THROUGH 2007 AND WILL CONFER WITH MS. JACKSON TO WORK OUT STRUCTURE OF SUPPORT FROM BEGINNING OF 2005 TO END OF 2007.
OUR AS ORDER OF COURT. MS. JACKSON SHALL PREPARE JUDGMENT. PET WAIVES CONFLICT. HEARING SET ON 8/22/01 @ 9:30AM SHALL BE VACATED. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED
